compiled_state.title: Add design_creation routing entry and update all dependent tests atomically
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Testing mode: UPDATE. RED coverage: test_ui_designer_routing_entry from Task ab85-baf6 (dependency explicit).
Files: config/agent-routing.conf, tests/scripts/test-agent-routing-conf.sh, tests/scripts/test-discover-agents.sh, .test-index.

IMPORTANT: All four file changes must land in a single commit to avoid a transient Gate 2 failure. Items are atomically coupled -- adding entry 11 to the conf without fixing the hardcoded count in test-discover-agents.sh:180 breaks test_stderr_logging_format.

Changes (single commit):
1. config/agent-routing.conf: Add line: design_creation=dso:ui-designer|general-purpose (11th entry, additive only)
2. tests/scripts/test-agent-routing-conf.sh: Add design_creation to EXPECTED_CATEGORIES array
3. tests/scripts/test-discover-agents.sh line 180: Replace hardcoded 10 with dynamic count:
   expected_log_count=$(grep -cE '^[a-z_]+=.+[|]general-purpose$' "$CONF_FILE")
   assert_eq "test_stderr_logging_format: ${expected_log_count} log lines" "$expected_log_count" "$match_count"
   Reason: test_stderr_logging_format at test-discover-agents.sh:180 currently asserts match_count equals hardcoded 10. After item 1 adds entry 11, match_count will be 11, causing the assertion to fail. Make count dynamic so it self-heals on future additions.
4. .test-index: Remove all 7 [test_ui_designer_*] RED markers (all 7 tests are now GREEN after this task)

Note: discover-agents.sh re-reads conf per invocation -- no restart or cache flush needed.

Acceptance criteria:
1. design_creation=dso:ui-designer|general-purpose in agent-routing.conf
2. design_creation in EXPECTED_CATEGORIES in test-agent-routing-conf.sh
3. test-discover-agents.sh line 180 uses dynamic grep -cE count (not hardcoded 10)
4. All 7 [test_ui_designer_*] RED markers removed from .test-index
5. bash tests/scripts/test-ui-designer-contract.sh exits 0 (all 7 PASS)
6. bash tests/scripts/test-agent-routing-conf.sh exits 0
7. bash tests/scripts/test-discover-agents.sh exits 0
8. Universal: bash tests/scripts/run-script-tests.sh exits 0

Verify:
  bash tests/scripts/test-ui-designer-contract.sh && bash tests/scripts/test-agent-routing-conf.sh && ! grep -qE '\[test_ui_designer' .test-index && echo All green markers removed
